inclusion_criteria: Original human studies (RCTs, crossover, before–after, cohort) in healthy individuals or patients with psychiatric diagnoses
Intervention includes administration of a psychoplastogen: ketamine, esketamine, LSD, psilocybin, ayahuasca, DMT, MDMA, scopolamine, or rapastinel (any route/dose)
Comparator includes either within-subject baseline (pre-treatment) or a placebo/control condition
Reports peripheral blood BDNF concentrations measured in serum or plasma at baseline and at least one post-intervention time point or as between-group differences vs control
exclusion_criteria: Nonhuman or in vitro studies; reviews, editorials, case reports, or nonoriginal data
Interventions that do not include the specified psychoplastogens or combine them with other active agents without a separable effect on BDNF

Outcomes not measuring BDNF in serum or plasma (e.g., CSF, brain tissue, saliva, whole blood cellular fractions, PBMCs/platelets) or studies reporting only genetic/epigenetic proxies or ex vivo–stimulated BDNF
No baseline or control comparator, or insufficient data to extract BDNF levels/change related to the psychoplastogen
screening_criteria.description: Screen for original human studies administering specified psychoplastogens that report peripheral serum/plasma BDNF with a baseline or placebo/control comparator.
